acceptanceReviewed.criterion: Fixtures are captured from the reference Linux host.
Fixture files are committed under an appropriate test fixture path.
Fixtures do not contain secrets or personal data.
acceptanceReviewed.evidence: Non-zero window addresses are redacted; fixture scan has no sensitive matches.

acceptanceReviewed.criterion: Parser follow-up needs are documented if fixture shape differs from expectations.

realWorldValidation.evidence: Live Hyprland 0.55.2 JSON was captured from the Linux reference host.
